mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM product_sku WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY price ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE product_sku SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{skuId} AND stock + #{quantity} >= 0
UPDATE product_sku SET sales = sales + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{skuId}
mapper.select: SELECT status AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM product_sku WHERE product_id = #{productId} GROUP BY status
